install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install --no-cache-dir transformers==4.46.3 accelerate==1.1.1 safetensors==0.4.5 huggingface_hub==0.26.2 sentencepiece protobuf
python -c "import transformers, datasets; print('libs ok', transformers.__version__, datasets.__version__)"

data_deps.name: qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct
data_deps.description: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct model weights for long-context inference (~3 GB)

data_deps.name: longctx
data_deps.description: PG-19 / WikiText-103 long-context corpus for PPL eval (~200 MB raw)

data_deps.name: longbench-qasper
data_deps.description: LongBench QA subsets (qasper + multifieldqa_en, ~100 examples each) for long-context QA eval
